# CANDIDATE: NLWB_REAL_FILLS_BACKTEST

**Filed:** 2026-05-22
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** backtest_validation
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

NLWB (NAMED_LEVEL_WICK_BOUNCE_BULL) requires real-fills validation via OPRA data to confirm the chart-stop-only configuration (premium_stop_pct=-0.99) produces viable P&L on J-adjacent bull days and a broader sample. Current evidence: 5/20 live session showed 5 fires at 740.0 round-number level → 4 STOPPED, 1 TP1_THEN_BE_STOP → -$138.61 total. This backtest quantifies whether the setup has edge or is structurally a loser.

## Mechanism

**Backtest configuration:**
- Premium stop: `-0.99` (chart-stop-only per L55 analog — essentially disables premium stop, relies solely on SPY closing below entry level)
- Entry trigger: NLWB — BULL bounce at named support level (PDL or round-$5), wick bounces below level then recovers
- Data source: OPRA real fills (not BS-sim) via `simulator_real.py`
- Exit: chart stop at rejection level (SPY closes below entry level + $0.50 buffer)

**Test windows:**
| Window | Days | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| J-adjacent bull | 2026-05-19, 2026-05-20 | NLWB fires on bull days; need to validate if these are winners or losers |
| Random sample | 10 randomly selected SPY 5m days (non-J, non-5/19-5/20) | Establish baseline WR and P&L distribution outside J-anchored context |

**Metrics to compute:**
- Win rate (WR)
- Average P&L per trade
- Max drawdown (single worst trade)
- Aggregate Sharpe (if N≥10)

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

NLWB is a BULL setup — OP-16 bear floor (J winners/losers) does not apply. This backtest is for OP-21 promotion assessment, not OP-16 edge capture.

| Test window | Expected outcome |
|---|---|
| 2026-05-19 | Unknown — requires real-fills run |
| 2026-05-20 | -$138.61 (live result, but chart-stop config may differ from live execution) |
| 10 random days | Unknown — depends on level quality and market regime |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** Paper $1K equivalent — qty=3 per NLWB spec
2. **Sample bias:** J-adjacent days are hand-selected; 10 random days mitigate but don't eliminate selection bias
3. **Out-of-sample:** 10 random days constitute held-out sample; J-adjacent days are in-sample by definition
4. **Real-fills:** This backtest IS the real-fills validation (OPRA data)
5. **Failure modes:** If WR < 50% or avg P&L < 0 → NLWB should remain WATCH-ONLY; if max drawdown > $200 on 3-contract qty → structural incompatibility
6. **Concentration:** Unknown until backtest runs

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Real-fills backtest completes on 2 J-adjacent + 10 random days
- [ ] WR ≥ 50% AND avg P&L > $0
- [ ] Max drawdown ≤ $200 on 3-contract qty
- [ ] Compare to live 5/20 result (-$138.61) — real-fills should be within ±20%

## Confidence

7/10 — NLWB has guard PASS (0 fires on J loser days), live session evidence shows the setup fires but loses money. Real-fills will confirm whether that's execution issue or structural edge absence.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

NLWB currently ranks #8 as WATCH-ONLY. This backtest result will determine whether it:
- Promotes to NEEDS-MORE-DATA (if WR≥50%, P&L>0)
- Remains WATCH-ONLY (if WR<50% or P&L≤0)
- Gets REJECTED (if max drawdown > $200 or WR < 40%)

No conflict with candidates 1-7 or 9-11.
